title: OutSystems Developer
description:
PebbleRoad is a Singapore-based strategy, design and innovation practice. We help organisations in their digital transformation journey by aligning their strategic vision, creating digital experiences and building internal capabilities.

We started our practice in 2004 with one objective: to do impactful work. This single-minded pursuit has guided who we hire, who we work for, the work we do and the decisions we make.

We work with clients such as DBS (Singapore), Digi (Malaysia), Sinar Mas (Indonesia), ADB (Philippines), CLP (Hong Kong) and many government agencies in Singapore.

PebbleRoad is a remote-first company. Yes, we have an office in Singapore, but it is used for reading books, team meetings, client meetings and celebrations.

In addition to work-from-anywhere culture, we adopt a horizontal structure emphasising self-management, flexibility and growth. You can also read more about our culture on our LinkedIn page.

Our work

We design and build human-centred, modern digital services.

We excel in 3 areas:

  1. Business: We are focused on creating business value. We engage business leaders on productivity, customer satisfaction, operational excellence and workplace culture.
  2. Design: We are design-led. We approach problems from an outside-in perspective, engage various stakeholders, test ideas and build prototypes.
  3. Tech: We build digital services using a modern tech stack that includes low-code tools, AI/ML and APIs. And yes, we use Scrum as our development methodology.

We assign a team to each project (an engagement). Every team is cross-functional and dedicated. The team roles include Engagement Directors, Product Owners, Product Designers, Content Strategists, UX Researchers and Engineers. These engagements may last between 3 to 18 months or more.

A typical engagement that you will lead might go like this:

  • Understand the context of the engagement.
  • Understand the product requirements.
  • Work closely with the team to define the product backlog and plan the development sprints.
  • Work with the Tech Lead and other developers to define quality and testing parameters.
  • Use best practices to build using OutSystems.
  • Be proactive and participate in daily standups, product reviews and quality meetings.

Responsibilities

Your responsibilities are:

  • Work with the team to build high-quality digital products using OutSystems.
  • Be proactive in absorbing new knowledge and raising the standards of development.
  • Help integrate the solution into the client’s enterprise ecosystem.
  • Work with backend systems integrators to build and implement the solution.
  • Improve transformation practice at PebbleRoad

Requirements

We’re looking for someone who:

  • Has 3+ years of experience developing using OutSystems (Service Studio & Integration Studio).
  • Has worked in enterprise environments.
  • Has worked with Agile methodologies
  • Has a good understanding of Rapid Application Development(RAD) best practices and implementation.
  • Has a good understanding of best practices for web application security.
  • Is proficient in data modelling and enforcing proper referential integrity constraints
  • Is proficient in web-based languages (JavaScript, CSS, HTML)
  • Is proficient in SQL
  • Is proficient in web services (REST and SOAP)
